params.withdrawalHash: Unique hash identifying the L2 withdrawal

params.amount: The amount received from bridge finalization
params.withdrawalHash: The withdrawal hash that was fast-claimed

UBI_FEE_SHARE().notice: Fraction of fee sent to UBI pool (2000 = 20%)

claimFastETHWithdrawal(uint256,address,b.notice: User claims a fast ETH withdrawal.

claimFastWithdrawal(address,uint256,addr.notice: User claims a fast ERC20 withdrawal. Any LP with enough balance is selected.

claimed(bytes32).notice: Track which hashes have been claimed (prevent double-claim)

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Deposit ERC20 liquidity to serve fast withdrawals.

settleETHWithdrawal(bytes32).notice: ETH settlement variant — LP sends ETH to restore position.

settleWithdrawal(bytes32,uint256).notice: LP reclaims capital after the bridge finalizes the withdrawal on L1.         The LP must have received the tokens from the bridge finalization         and deposits them back here to restore their balance.

totalLiquidity(address).notice: Total liquidity deposited per token across all LPs

withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw idle ERC20 liquidity (not locked in pending claims).

documentation.text:
@title FastWithdrawalLP
 @notice Liquidity providers front L2→L1 withdrawals so users skip the 7-day
         OP Stack challenge period. The LP earns a fee (configurable, default 0.1%).
 Flow:
  1. User initiates withdrawal on L2 (burn tokens, queue cross-domain message).
  2. User calls `claimFastWithdrawal(token, amount, to, withdrawalHash)` on L1.
  3. An LP with enough liquidity fills the claim instantly for (amount - fee).
  4. When the 7-day challenge settles, the LP calls `settleWithdrawal(hash)` to
     recoup their capital from the bridge's finalized release.
 Security:
  - Each withdrawal hash can only be claimed once.
  - LP deposits are ring-fenced per LP address; one LP's insolvency doesn't
    affect another.
  - 20% of fast-withdrawal fees route to the UBI pool (GoodDollar principle).
@notice Fraction of fee sent to UBI pool (2000 = 20%)
@notice Total liquidity deposited per token across all LPs
@notice Track which hashes have been claimed (prevent double-claim)
@notice Deposit ERC20 liquidity to serve fast withdrawals.
@notice Withdraw idle ERC20 liquidity (not locked in pending claims).
@notice User claims a fast ETH withdrawal.
@notice ETH settlement variant — LP sends ETH to restore position.
